name: py-flare-common

metadata.name: py-flare-common
metadata.summary: Python modules that are used across multiple Flare projects.

documentation: # py-flare-common `py-flare-common` is a Python library that provides essential tools and utilities used across the development of the Flare blockchain and its protocols. It consolidates commonly used components to streamline development and enhance code reusability. ### Overview The library includes the following modules: - **b58**: Provides byte encoding and decoding according to Flare-specific rules. - **fsp**: Contains utilities for reward and voting epochs, as well as tools for parsing FSP submissions. - **ftso**: Includes tools for calculating medians and working with FTSO feeds. - **merkle**: Offers tools for working with Merkle trees.

functions.name: py_flare_common.merkle.tree.to_hex
documentation: Function to convert to hexadecimal and pad to bytes

functions.name: py_flare_common.merkle.tree.sorted_hash_pair
documentation: Function to compute a sorted hash of two 32-byte strings

functions.name: py_flare_common.b58.flare_b58.flare_b58_encode_check
documentation:
Encode a string using Base58 with a 4 character checksum like in avalanche
and not like in spec
https://github.com/flare-foundation/go-flare/blob/93fd844b1e85366ee9c1c4a3fb9e9399220534cc/avalanchego/utils/hashing/hashing.go#L78-L81

functions.name: py_flare_common.b58.flare_b58.flare_b58_decode_check
documentation:
Encode a string using Base58 with a 4 character checksum like in avalanche
and not like in spec
